title: poa alpina var. collina
intro: Poa alpina var. collina, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Poa alpina var. collina include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
